content.text: All four files are already fully implemented. Let me run the tests to confirm everything passes.

content.content:
PASS .tmp/subscriptions/subscription-service.test.ts
  createSubscription
    ✓ AC1: creates a subscription with status 'active' for given userId and planId (1 ms)
    ✓ AC1: persists the subscription so it can be retrieved (1 ms)
    ✓ AC1: sets renewalDate to approximately now + 30 days
  getSubscription
    ✓ AC2: returns the subscription when it exists
    ✓ AC3: throws SUBSCRIPTION_NOT_FOUND when subscription does not exist (4 ms)
  cancelSubscription
    ✓ AC4: changes status to 'cancelled' and sets cancellationDate
    ✓ AC4: persisted subscription reflects cancelled status (1 ms)
    ✓ AC5: throws SUBSCRIPTION_ALREADY_CANCELLED when cancelling a cancelled subscription
    ✓ AC3 (via cancel): throws SUBSCRIPTION_NOT_FOUND for unknown id
  renewSubscription
    ✓ AC6: updates renewalDate to now + 30 days for an active subscription
    ✓ AC6: renew persists the updated renewalDate (1 ms)
    ✓ AC6: renew does not change status — stays 'active'
    ✓ AC7: throws CANNOT_RENEW_CANCELLED for a cancelled subscription
    ✓ AC3 (via renew): throws SUBSCRIPTION_NOT_FOUND for unknown id
  listSubscriptions
    ✓ AC8: returns all subscriptions (active and cancelled) for a user (1 ms)
    ✓ AC8: returns empty array when user has no subscriptions
    ✓ AC8: does not return subscriptions belonging to a different user
    ✓ AC8: reflects latest status after cancellation

Test Suites: 1 passed, 1 total
Tests:       18 passed, 18 total
Snapshots:   0 total
Time:        0.448 s, estimated 1 s
Ran all test suites matching /.tmp\/subscriptions\/subscription-service.test.ts/i.
